site.name: DosCode
site.description: DosCode builds fast business launches for companies in Kazakhstan: websites, landing pages, MVPs, business dashboards, bots, e-commerce, and automation.

navigation.title: RestoPulse
navigation.bestFit: Restaurant owners and operators using iiko

navigation.title: WhatsApp Operator Copilot
navigation.bestFit: Teams where WhatsApp is a main sales or support channel

services.name: Landing pages and websites
services.summary: Clear offer, fast page, lead capture, and launch path connected to Telegram, WhatsApp, forms, payments, or analytics.

services.name: Business products
services.summary: E-commerce, dashboards, bots, internal tools, reports, and operational systems for small and medium businesses.

services.name: MVP and SaaS builds
services.summary: First working product with users, backend, admin logic, integrations, and deployment.

products.name: RestoPulse
products.summary: Connects to iiko and sends restaurant owners reports in Telegram: sales, average check, shifts, staff, menu items, discounts, delivery, and operational issues.
products.audience: Restaurant owners and operators using iiko

products.name: WhatsApp Operator Copilot
products.summary: Desktop workspace for teams that answer customers in WhatsApp, with multiple accounts, notifications, AI reply suggestions, rewriting, and company context.
products.audience: Restaurants, delivery teams, e-commerce, service businesses, and support teams
